design_philosophy: Swiss Brutalist SaaS. Extreme clarity, architectural precision, exposed grids. 95% of the UI is monochrome. Color is strictly functional (Signal Red for alerts/actions, Klein Blue for active states). Generous padding mixed with dense, hard-edged bento grids.

layout.spacing: Generous spacing strategy for containers (p-8 to p-12), tight dense spacing for data widgets (gap-0 to gap-px).
layout.grid_strategy: Control Room Bento Protocol (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4) with border-collapse and exposed internal grids. No floating cards—everything locks into the skeleton. Use pure HTML/Tailwind for structural layout instead of Shadcn Cards.
layout.borders: 1px solid #09090B on primary containers, 1px solid #D4D4D8 on internal dividers. 2px solid #09090B for focused elements.

components.cards: Go cardless. Use exposed grid skeleton. Items get border-r border-b. No soft shadows. Solid backgrounds.
components.buttons: Brutalist block. High contrast text. Primary: bg-[#0033CC] text-white rounded-none hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#09090B] border border-[#0033CC] hover:border-[#09090B] transition-all. Secondary: bg-white border border-[#09090B] text-[#09090B] hover:bg-[#F4F4F5] rounded-none.
components.inputs: Flat, pure geometric rectangle. 1px solid #09090B, focus:border-[#0033CC] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#0033CC]. rounded-none.
components.badges: Square corners, mono font, tiny text. bg-[#E4E4E7] text-[#09090B] border border-[#09090B].
components.navigation: Solid white background, strict hard bottom border (1px solid #09090B). Logo in Chivo Black. Links in IBM Plex Mono. Active link gets a 2px bottom border or Klein Blue text.
components.modals: Use Shadcn Dialog but remove all rounded corners (rounded-none). Add an aggressive border (border-2 border-[#09090B]) and hard drop shadow (shadow-[8px_8px_0px_0px_#09090B]). Scrim should be bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm.

motion.hover: Brutalist snap. -translate-y-[2px] with a hard black drop shadow (shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(9,9,11,1)]).

images.description: Minimalist geometric composition for login/signup split screen background.
3D claymation style clean clipboard for when task list is empty.
Professional team working, to be used as default project cover.

icons.style: weight='regular' for UI, weight='fill' for active navigation.

instructions_to_main_agent: Add fonts via Google Fonts: Chivo (wght 400..900), IBM Plex Sans (400, 600), IBM Plex Mono (400, 600).
Implement the 'Control Room Bento Protocol' for the dashboard layout. Use pure HTML/Tailwind to create grid skeletons instead of Shadcn Card components to avoid the standard Vercel look.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Chivo'.
Strictly follow the JSON colors. Never use generic Tailwind blue/red; use the exact hex codes from this file.
Implement brutalist button hover effects globally: translate-y and hard shadow.
Make sure all interactive and informational elements have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-button').
Status pills for tasks MUST use mono typography with high contrast colors defined in colors.status.
Use Shadcn UI for complex components (Dialog, DropdownMenu, Select) but aggressively override their default styles to remove rounded corners and soft shadows.
